description_long: This hamburger features a golden-brown sesame seed bun with a generous scattering of white sesame seeds on its domed top. Crisp, leafy green lettuce is layered just beneath the top bun, providing a fresh and textured appearance. Thick slices of red tomato and creamy white cheese are visible, stacked above a well-cooked beef patty that has a slightly charred surface. The bottom bun is slightly lighter in color and appears soft and pillowy. The toppings are arranged in a classic, inviting manner, with the lettuce and tomato peeking out from all sides. No packaging or additional garnishes are present, and the hamburger looks ready to eat.
description: A classic hamburger with a sesame seed bun, leafy lettuce, tomato slices, cheese, and a beef patty, all stacked in a visually appealing arrangement. The fresh toppings and golden bun make it look appetizing and ready to eat.
description_view_0: The hamburger is shown with the lettuce and tomato prominently visible, and the sesame seed bun is clearly displayed on top.
description_view_1: This view highlights the lettuce and tomato, with a slight glimpse of pickles and the beef patty more visible beneath the toppings.
description_view_2: The side view emphasizes the thick tomato slice and cheese, with the lettuce ruffled around the edges and the patty peeking out.
description_view_3: This angle shows the layered arrangement of lettuce, tomato, cheese, and pickles, with the sesame seed bun fully visible on top.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Lettuce is layered directly beneath the top bun, followed by tomato slices and cheese, with pickles and the beef patty beneath. The toppings are evenly distributed and visible from all sides.
